game_info.title: Risk of Rain - Action Platformer Roguelike
game_info.concept:
Risk of Rain is an action platformer with roguelike elements. With permanent death as a primary feature, players will have to play their best to get as far as possible. Fight on a mysterious planet with randomly spawning enemies and bosses, either alone or with 3 friends in online co-op.

Risk of Rain 2 Steam Page

Risk of Rain 2 Steam Store Page Now Live!

Risk of Rain 2 is a 3D action multiplayer rogue-lite that brings you back to the mysterious crash site of the Contact Light. No run will ever be the same with randomized stages, monsters, bosses, items, and more. Play solo or team up with friends online to fight your way through hordes of monsters and find a way to escape the planet.


About the Game

Risk of Rain is an action platformer with roguelike elements. With permanent death as a primary feature, players will have to play their best to get as far as possible. Fight on a mysterious planet with randomly spawning enemies and bosses, either alone or with 3 friends in online co-op. With over 100 items at your disposal, you will find the tools you need to find the teleporter back home. Discover a myriad of randomly chosen stages, from the desolate forest to the frozen tundra.

The three main goals for our game are simple:

1. Design a game that is randomly generated every play-through, to keep replayability high and fresh.

2. Time = difficulty. The higher the in-game time gets, the harder the difficulty gets. Keeping a sense of urgency keeps the game exciting!

3. Be enjoyable, regardless of whether you win or lose. No more fussing with complex and non-intuitive gameplay patterns. Players should not blame the game for their loss!

''..joy comes from amassing items, gaining experience and watching your character evolve into a godly killing machine.'' - Joystiq

''This game is immaculate. The enemy design, the sound effects, the powers, the fights, all of it feels wonderful.'' - Eurogamer

"..a ridiculously compelling procedurally generated side-scrolling platform survivor-me-do, with multiple characters to play as, single and co-op play, and some of the hardest-hitting deaths I've experienced in such games" - RockPaperShotgun

Key Features


  • Engage in local and online multiplayer with friends and other players from around the world!
  • Play and unlock 12 unique characters, from the Commando to the Miner to the Engineer.
  • Fight through hordes of different enemies and bosses, randomly chosen by the game with random abilities and powers.
  • Get lost and discover 10 massive levels with different enemies, shrines, and chests on each one!
  • Recruit the help of a wide variety of drones, from missile drones to healing drones!
  • Unlock the lore of the game through the item and monster logs!
  • Unlock new items and characters through difficult achievements to keep the game fresh with each playthrough.
  • Save your best highscores and stats!
game_info.description: Survive on a hostile alien planet in this action platformer roguelike! Battle through waves of increasingly dangerous enemies while collecting powerful items that stack to create devastating combinations. Time is your enemy - the longer you survive, the harder it gets. Find the teleporter to escape each stage, but be ready for a brutal boss fight. Death is permanent, but each run teaches you more. Can you escape the planet alive?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Arrow Up: Jump
Space: Shoot projectile
Z: Use special ability (dash)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement, jumping, and shooting mechanics. Verifying that the player can navigate the platform, avoid basic enemies, and use combat abilities effectively in the early game.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the stage using arrow keys, jump to reach platforms, and shoot at nearby enemies. Test the dash ability for quick escapes. Collect items that spawn to verify pickup mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly, jump with proper physics, shoot projectiles that damage enemies, and collect items successfully. No physics glitches or collision issues. Test passes after 30 seconds of stable gameplay.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing difficulty scaling over time. Verifying that enemy spawn rate, enemy strength, and overall challenge increase as the in-game timer advances.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Survive for an extended period without activating the teleporter. Observe enemy spawn patterns and difficulty. Collect items to keep pace with scaling. Monitor if the game becomes increasingly challenging.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemy count and power should visibly increase over time. More enemies spawn per wave. Player should feel increasing pressure. Difficulty scaling should make the game harder but still manageable with good play.

TEST_3.expected: Enemy count and power should visibly increase over time. More enemies spawn per wave. Player should feel increasing pressure. Difficulty scaling should make the game harder but still manageable with good play.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing death mechanics and game over state. Verifying that taking damage reduces health correctly, and reaching zero health triggers game over lose condition.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies by walking into them or getting hit by projectiles. Let health drain to zero without collecting healing items. Verify death animation and transition to game over screen.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Health decreases with each hit. At zero health, player dies and game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Game over screen displays with final score and restart option working correctly.
TEST_4.description: Testing death mechanics and game over state. Verifying that taking damage reduces health correctly, and reaching zero health triggers game over lose condition.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing item synergy and power stacking. Verifying that collecting multiple items creates meaningful gameplay changes and stat improvements.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Focus entirely on collecting as many items as possible. Test if multiple copies of the same item stack effects. Verify that different item combinations create noticeable power increases in damage, speed, or survivability.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Each item collected should provide visible benefits. Multiple items should stack effects. Player should feel noticeably stronger with 5+ items. Stat increases should be reflected in gameplay (faster shooting, more damage, higher jumps).

TEST_6.test_description: Testing boss fight mechanics after teleporter activation. Verifying boss spawns correctly, has appropriate health and attack patterns, and defeating it triggers stage completion.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Rush to teleporter quickly. Activate it to spawn the boss. Engage in the boss fight using all available abilities. Test boss attack patterns, hitboxes, and health bar accuracy.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Boss spawns immediately after teleporter activation. Boss has distinct attack patterns and appropriate health scaling. Defeating boss triggers win condition. Boss fight should be challenging but fair.
TEST_6.description: Testing boss fight mechanics after teleporter activation. Verifying boss spawns correctly, has appropriate health and attack patterns, and defeating it triggers stage completion.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing particle effects, visual feedback, and overall polish. Verifying that combat feels impactful with proper visual effects for hits, deaths, and item pickups.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Engage in various combat scenarios. Observe particle effects when shooting, hitting enemies, collecting items, and taking damage. Verify visual polish during movement and special abilities.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: All major actions should have particle effects. Hit feedback should be clear and satisfying. Death animations should play for enemies. Item pickups should have visual flair. Overall presentation should feel polished and responsive.
